raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A clear plastic cup with a handle is on a blue fabric surface. A white plastic bottle is in the background. The cup is rigid with a side handle; the fabric is soft and flexible. STRATEGY - reach the cup at its body to approach, grasp the handle for secure hold, lift and transport above the fabric, then place gently on the fabric. Failure modes include dropping the cup during transport or placing it on a non-stable area. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach cup body; Step 2 grasp handle for secure hold; Step 3 transport above fabric; Step 4 lower onto fabric center.

Goal: on(cup, fabric); stable(cup)
Scene: cup, fabric, bottle
Step 1: reach(cup)
  affordance_region: the body of the cup
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, cup, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, cup) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(cup)
  affordance_region: the side handle of the cup
  contact: holding(cup) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(cup)
Step 3: transport(cup -> fabric)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the fabric
  spatial: above(cup, fabric, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(cup)
  done_when: above(cup, fabric, 0.05)
Step 4: place(cup -> fabric)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the fabric
  contact: surface_contact(cup, fabric) [completion]; released(cup) [completion]
  pose: stable(cup) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(cup, fabric) AND released(cup)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the side handle of the cup
an empty area on the fabric
an empty area on the fabric
